title: picea religiosa
intro: Picea religiosa, also known as Mexican or Colorado blue spruce, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and the southwestern United States. The essential oil extracted from its needles has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Picea religiosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory function, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The herbal preparations of Picea religiosa include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical applications, such as creams and ointments, or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
